inputs.label: Solar Masses
inputs.businessContext: The mass in solar masses to convert.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: The number of kilograms in one solar mass (default is 1.989 × 10³⁰ kg).

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output.

inputs.label: Uncertainty (±%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage uncertainty for the conversion, used to compute lower and upper bounds.

formulas.massInKg: Math.round(solarMassValue * conversionFactor * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)
formulas.conversionResult: 'Converted mass: ' + (Math.round(solarMassValue * conversionFactor * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) + ' kg'
formulas.uncertaintyRange: 'Uncertainty range: ' + (Math.round((solarMassValue * conversionFactor) * (1 - uncertaintyPercent / 100) * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) + ' to ' + (Math.round((solarMassValue * conversionFactor) * (1 + uncertaintyPercent / 100) * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) + ' kg'
